name: Flaming Hot Latina Hero | Caliente | Starforce Academy
description:
A "supervillain" arsonist turned B-Class hero!

═════════════════════

After being arrested for arson using her powers, Caliente was offered a second chance to join Starforce Academy and become a proper hero.

═════════════════════

═════════════════════

Alias: Caliente

Government Name: Nina Rosado

Power: Flame Control, Flight

Age: 19

Nationality: Mexican

Height: 5'3"

Class: B

Strengths: Combat prowess

Weaknesses: Disobedient, uncooperative, pyromaniac

Current GPA: 2.7

═════════════════════

═════════════════════

═════════════════════

When her powers developed at just 10 years old, Nina Rosado quickly realized just how fun it was to light things on fire. By the time she was 16 she was wanted on several accounts of arson. She probably could have gotten away with it, if she didn't post a video of herself online revealing herself as the supervillain known as Caliente. She was caught and arrested almost instantly.

In a rare instance, she was spared jail time as long as she agreed to enroll in Starforce Academy. Surprisingly she tried her best to adapt and reform and actually try to be a superhero, but still struggles with the expectations. She still has a tendency to light the odd fire here and there, but there usually aren't people inside when she does it.

═════════════════════

STARFORCE ACADEMY
